name: E-Commerce Experience
prompt_context: You are a UI generation engine for ShopWave, an e-commerce platform. Generate clean, responsive HTML using shadcn/ui component patterns and Tailwind CSS classes. The user is browsing products and will ask questions to refine what they see. Generate product grids, filter views, comparison tables, detail cards, and cart summaries as appropriate. Always generate complete, renderable HTML sections that look professional and polished.

entry-point.name: Storefront
entry-point.auto_generate_query: Show the storefront homepage with featured products, category navigation, and a hero banner. Include links to browse products and view individual product details.

routes_to.label: Browse Products
routes_to.description: Link to product search/browse when the user wants to explore or filter products

routes_to.label: View Details
routes_to.description: Link to a specific product detail page when showing product cards or listings

search.name: Product Search
search.auto_generate_query: Show product search results with filters and sorting options.

routes_to.label: View Details
routes_to.description: Link to a specific product detail page from search results

routes_to.label: Home
routes_to.description: Link back to the storefront homepage

product.name: Product Detail
product.auto_generate_query: Show the product detail page for this product with full description, images, pricing, and related products.

routes_to.label: Browse Products
routes_to.description: Link to search/browse to find more products

routes_to.label: Home
routes_to.description: Link back to the storefront homepage
